bodySummary: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia We’re partnering with leading Australian health organizations to bring new AI tools to regional communities. This project helps identify heart health risks early, making proactive care possible for more people. Head of Strategic Health Solutions, Asia-Pacific Google is partnering with Australian health organizations to improve heart health in rural areas…

titleZh: Hugging Face开源上下文窗口、开源
titleEn: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
kickerZh: Hugging Face · Agent 与开发者工具
kickerEn: Hugging Face · Agents and developer tooling
summaryZh: Hugging Face开源了围绕上下文窗口、开源的工作，让外部生态可以更直接地复用、检查和二次构建。 正文里最值得记下的信号是：- Then we generated ~80k trajectories 用于 the full 工作流 using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model. 为什么值得看：行业竞争点正在从“聊天回答得好不好”转向“能不能稳定接进软件、工具链和自动化流程”…
summaryEn: Hugging Face turned work around context window and open source into something the wider ecosystem can inspect, adapt, and build on. The strongest signal in the article is: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full workflow using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model. Why it matters…

whyItMattersEn: The competitive focus is shifting from chat quality to whether models can plug into software, tooling, and automation flows reliably; that is where durable productivity entry points emerge.

evidenceBulletsZh: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories 用于 the full 工作流 using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model.
用于 the 基准测试 submission, a fine-tuned Nemotron 3 drives the researcher, which processes 4x more tokens than the planner and orchestrator combined.
Custom Middleware 用于 Long-Horizon Reliability Each agent and subagent interleaves LLM and tool calls across many steps (often 32+).
evidenceBulletsEn: - Then we generated ~80k trajectories for the full workflow using the open-sourced GPT-OSS-120B model.
For the benchmark submission, a fine-tuned Nemotron 3 drives the researcher, which processes 4x more tokens than the planner and orchestrator combined.
Custom Middleware for Long-Horizon Reliability Each agent and subagent interleaves LLM and tool calls across many steps (often 32+).

bodySummary: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached #1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II Enterprise + Article Published March 12, 2026 - Contributors : Raja Biswas, Divyansh Jain, Ivan Sorokin, Alessio Devoto, Chantal D Gama Rose, Ajay Thorve, David Austin, Jean-Francois Puget NVIDIA AI-Q deep research agent recently achieved first place on both DeepResearch Bench (55.95) and DeepResearch Bench II (54.50)…
